events.text: Goal!  Brazil 1, Korea Republic 0. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Neymar.
Goal!  Brazil 2, Korea Republic 0. Neymar (Brazil) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Brazil 3, Korea Republic 0. Richarlison (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Thiago Silva with a through ball.
Goal!  Brazil 4, Korea Republic 0. Lucas Paquetá (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Vinícius Júnior.
Jung Woo-Young (Korea Republic) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Brazil 4, Korea Republic 1. Paik Seung-Ho (Korea Republic) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner    following a set piece situation.
